series_metadata.series_description: This series contains correspondence, authorizations, rates, rules, forms, cover letters and current year disapprovals.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Image retained until superseded then destroy. Review remaining images after 25 years to verify that records are still active ; Paper: Hard copy retained until microfilmed or imaged then destroy provided the microfilm or image has been checked for quality and completeness ; Microform: Microfilm retained until superseded, then destroy. Review microfilm after 25 years to verify that records are still active, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper ; Microform: Wastepaper
